notes: THE DEVIL's six-face arcana die. Rolled on Threshold Rolls during a Devil run. Faces 1-4 cluster around the room's gravity; face 5 (BUST) is the bar winning; face 6 (LAST CALL) is the wild — closes well if you've settled, badly if you haven't.

faces.description: Success ★★. Six steps. The room lets the door go for you tonight. Advance two spaces toward your declared threshold.
Success ★. The honest version of the line. Spend 1 Time, advance one toward your threshold.
Partial. Lou refills. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take the refill (+1 CHAIN, +1 Time).
Partial. The juke turns over to a song you almost knew. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or stay (+1 CHAIN).
Failure. You did not roll a leaving. +1 CHAIN. Lou pours.
Wild. ★★ if you have SETTLED UP this turn — the bell is your bell. Otherwise: failure, and the gator head turns its head.
